nasb.text: According to their uncleanness and according to their transgressions I dealt with them, and I hid My face from them.” ’ ”

esv.text: I dealt with them according to their uncleanness and their transgressions, and hid my face from them.

cnv.text: 我是照著他們的污穢和過犯對待他們，並且掩面不顧他們。

ccb.text: 我照他们的污秽和罪恶报应他们，掩面不顾他们。’
